---
title: "Mark Gingrass"
page-layout: full
toc: false
resources:
  - "dark-mode.js"
---

<script src="dark-mode.js"></script>

::: {.hero}
::: {.hero-content}
**Technical Leader • Developer • Problem Solver**

Product Manager • Turning complexity into clarity.
Aligning users, business goals, and engineering to ship solutions that matter.

:::
:::

::: {.container}
<div class="row mt-12">
<div class="col-md-6">

## Professional

Product leader with 20+ years in the federal sector. For the past eight years, I have been specializing in product strategy, user-centered innovation, and delivering solutions with tangible outcomes. I have a track record of defining product vision for complex enterprise systems, translating ambiguous stakeholder needs into actionable roadmaps, and leading cross-functional teams to build products that people actually use and value.

I am the connector and translator across disciplines. I work with user needs, business goals, and technical experts daily. I focus on building trust with stakeholders at every level—from end users to division directors and key decision-makers.
Extensive experience partnering with defense, regulatory, and federal agencies to modernize legacy systems and prove that government technology can be world-class.

### Current Focus

* Leading product strategy for FDA modernization initiatives that serve 400+ regulatory scientists
* Building platforms that reduce manual workflows and accelerate decisions
* Championing AI-powered solutions that unlock decades of trapped regulatory data
* Staying technically credible through hands-on iOS development (SwiftUI, because learning keeps me humble)

</div>
<div class="col-md-6">

![Mark Gingrass Pose](images/MarkPro.webp){.img-fluid .rounded-xl .shadow-lg}

</div>
</div>

<div class="row mt-12">
<div class="col-md-4">

## Outdoor Enthusiast

I have been hiking for several years now, lately focused on overnight trips and more grueling terrain. I also dabble with mountain biking, running, fitness, and skateboarding.

I make annual trips to the Upper Gauley in West Virginia for Class 5 whitewater, have completed a solo skydive, and volunteer regularly to plant trees and clean up trails.

My dog Ollie joins me on trails and camping whenever possible.

</div>
<div class="col-md-4">

## Curious Mind

I have interests in technology, policy, governance, and efficiency. I enjoy learning about Lean, Six Sigma, and anything related to improving efficiency and eliminating wasteful processes.

At the end of the day, I'm always seeking ways to combine what I know with what I love.

</div>
<div class="col-md-4">

## What I'm Learning

- **AI Agent Workflows**: Building multi-step agentic pipelines with Claude and GPT-4o
- **Regulatory Data Science**: Connecting structured policy data to actionable product insights
- **AWS Solutions Architect Associate**: Working toward certification in cloud architecture, infrastructure design, and AWS services
- **Political Economy**: Reading deeply across institutions, power structures, and democratic theory

</div>
</div>

## Recent Newsletter Posts

<div id="newsletter-posts"><p style="color: var(--text-muted, #888);">Loading posts…</p></div>

:::

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  const container = document.getElementById('newsletter-posts');
  if (!container) return;

  fetch('/.netlify/functions/newsletter-feed')
    .then(function(res) { return res.json(); })
    .then(function(data) {
      container.innerHTML = '';
      if (!data.items || !data.items.length) return;

      const grid = document.createElement('div');
      grid.className = 'blog-grid';

      data.items.forEach(function(item) {
        const date = item.pubDate
          ? new Date(item.pubDate).toLocaleDateString('en-US', { year: 'numeric', month: 'long', day: 'numeric' })
          : '';
        const snippet = item.description
          ? item.description.replace(/<[^>]*>/g, '').substring(0, 150).trim() + '…'
          : '';

        const card = document.createElement('div');
        card.className = 'blog-card';
        card.innerHTML =
          '<h3><a href="' + item.link + '" target="_blank" rel="noopener">' + item.title + '</a></h3>' +
          (snippet ? '<p>' + snippet + '</p>' : '') +
          (date ? '<div class="blog-meta">' + date + '</div>' : '');
        grid.appendChild(card);
      });

      container.appendChild(grid);
    })
    .catch(function() { container.innerHTML = ''; });
});
</script>

<script>
// Add scroll animations
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  const observerOptions = {
    threshold: 0.1,
    rootMargin: '0px 0px -50px 0px'
  };
  
  const observer = new IntersectionObserver(function(entries) {
    entries.forEach(entry => {
      if (entry.isIntersecting) {
        entry.target.classList.add('animate-fadeInUp');
      }
    });
  }, observerOptions);
  
  // Observe all cards and sections
  document.querySelectorAll('.card, .app-card, .col-md-4, .col-md-6').forEach(el => {
    observer.observe(el);
  });
  
  // Add smooth scrolling for anchor links
  document.querySelectorAll('a[href^="#"]').forEach(anchor => {
    anchor.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
      e.preventDefault();
      const target = document.querySelector(this.getAttribute('href'));
      if (target) {
        target.scrollIntoView({
          behavior: 'smooth',
          block: 'start'
        });
      }
    });
  });
});
</script>
